overall.description: A first-person perspective scene from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a street food vendor stall at night. The player observes a vendor preparing food and serving customers in a neon-lit cyberpunk urban environment with wet pavement and futuristic signage.

agents.ego_description: standing at the food stall counter watching the vendor work

notable_agents.action: vendor woman stretching, checking her phone, and preparing food at the stall

entered.detail: heated glass case containing burgers and french fries
large circular neon sign with cyan and pink lettering
futuristic digital display showing menu items and prices
ketchup and mustard dispensers on the counter
traditional red lanterns hanging above the stall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a cyberpunk street food stall at night, illuminated by vibrant neon signs. A vendor in a teal tank top works behind the counter, occasionally stretching and checking her phone. The stall features a glass display case with burgers and fries, condiment bottles on the counter, and futuristic digital menu screens.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk street food stall with customer interaction

events.description: man in white suit approaches and stands at the counter to order

agents.ego_description: watching the interaction between the vendor and the customer in the white suit

notable_agents.action: man in white suit standing at the counter waiting for his order
vendor gesturing and talking to the customer while working

segments.scene_description: A customer in a white suit arrives at the stall and stands at the counter. The vendor interacts with him, gesturing as they converse. The camera remains mostly stationary, capturing the transaction from a first-person perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk street food stall with new customer

events.description: man in plaid shirt arrives as the first customer departs

agents.ego_description: observing the vendor serve the new customer in the plaid shirt

notable_agents.action: man in plaid shirt waiting at the counter with arms crossed
vendor preparing food and engaging with the new customer

segments.scene_description: The first customer leaves and a new customer in a plaid shirt arrives. The vendor continues working, preparing food while interacting with the new patron. The neon-lit cyberpunk street remains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk food stall interior and prep area

events.description: camera begins moving around the stall to examine the food display and prep area

agents.ego_description: moving around the stall to inspect the food display case and kitchen equipment from different angles

notable_agents.action: vendor moving to the side of the stall near the prep area

entered.detail: food preparation counter with stacked plates and cooking utensils
stainless steel cooking appliances and storage containers

segments.scene_description: The camera moves around the stall, providing close-up views of the food display case containing burgers and fries. The vendor moves to the side near the prep area, and the camera reveals kitchen equipment and preparation counters previously hidden from view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective at a neon-lit street food stall, transitioning from a wide observation of the vendor to an intimate exploration of the kitchen's inner workings. It begins with a view of a vendor in a teal tank top managing her stall amidst vibrant digital menus and glass displays of burgers and fries. As a customer in a white suit arrives, the camera captures their conversation and transaction before shifting focus to a second patron in a plaid shirt who takes his place at the counter. The scene then expands as the camera glides around the stall, moving past the food display to reveal the hidden prep area and industrial kitchen equipment. Finally, the perspective settles on the functional details of the cooking space, leaving the glowing cyberpunk street as a blurred backdrop.
